← All NHC examples

NHC1 — competitor without starting TCF is rejected; sub-MinFin suppresses update

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): — 
3 boats; one (Gamma) has no nhcStartingTcf at all and must be rejected
with reason 'no_starting_tcf'.

After rejection, only 2 boats race — under SWNHC2015's MinFin = 3 the
rating update is suppressed for the whole fleet. Alpha and Beta keep
their starting TCF (1.000) unchanged, and the aggregate fields
(p50, σ, etc.) report defaults with updateSuppressed = true.
no nhcStartingTcf — must be rejected

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00   Finishers: 2   CTavg: 55m 00s   mean(TCF): 1.0000
Rating update suppressed (finishers 2 < MinFin 3)
RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT QSαZadjnew TCF Points
1 Alpha 1 14:50:00 50m 00s 1.0000 50m 00s — — — — — 1.0000 1
2 Beta 2 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s — — — — — 1.0000 2

Series standings

RankNameSail #R1TotalNet
1 Alpha 1 1 1 1
2 Beta 2 2 2 2
sailscoring.ie
